task_desc: Add food-seeking behavior, gradual feeding, and interaction visual feedback -- (1) add directional food-seeking: compute angle from fly to nearest food item, inject directional bias into targetDir via olfactory pathway when BRAIN.stimulate.foodNearby is true and hunger is above threshold, so the fly actively orients and walks toward placed food, (2) make feeding gradual: fly stays in feed state for 2-5 seconds with proboscis extended, food item shrinks visually during feeding, food is removed only after the feeding duration completes (currently food.splice happens instantly on distance check every frame), (3) add visual feedback for tool interactions: draw a small expanding ripple at the click point for touch tool, draw a wind direction arrow for air tool drag, add a subtle glow/pulse on food items when the fly is within 50px approach range, (4) add the groom drive meter to the bottom panel (currently 4 of 5 drives are shown, groom is missing) -- add a new drive-row with label "Groom" and a drive-bar element colored with var(--accent), wire it to BRAIN.drives.groom in updateBrain(). Files: js/main.js, css/main.css, index.html.
